users.title: User Profile
users.description: Stores user profile information and settings.

uid.description: The unique ID of the user.

createdAt.description: When the user account was created.

watchlist.title: Watchlist Item
watchlist.description: A stock symbol added to a user's watchlist.

uid.description: The ID of the user who owns this item.

tabIndex.description: The index of the watchlist tab (1-5).

alerts.title: Price Alert
alerts.description: A custom price alert for a stock.

uid.description: The ID of the user who owns this alert.

threshold.description: The price threshold for the alert.

type.description: Whether to alert when price is above or below the threshold.

isTriggered.description: Whether the alert has been triggered.

orders.title: Stock Order
orders.description: A buy or sell transaction for a stock.

uid.description: The ID of the user who placed this order.

totalValue.description: The total value of the order.

fee.description: The transaction fee for the order.

realizedPnL.description: Profit or loss realized on a sell order.

holdings.title: Stock Holding
holdings.description: The current quantity and average cost of a stock owned by a user.

uid.description: The ID of the user who owns this holding.

quantity.description: The total number of shares currently held.

investedValue.description: The total amount invested in this stock.

lastUpdatedAt.description: When the holding was last updated.
